title: benzingia estradae
intro: Benzingia estradae, also known as the Mexican orchid tree or Mexican orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Benzingia estradae include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as wounds and eczema. Benzingia estradae is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use, and it can also be found in herbal supplements and teas.
